title: Event Operations Volunteer
description: Support logistics, attendee check-in, and run-of-show execution for upcoming events.

title: Content & Media Team
description: Create social posts, event recaps, and photo/video coverage for IEEE GUB activities.

title: Workshop Co-Lead (AI Track)

title: Sponsorship Outreach
description: Build partnerships with local industry and coordinate sponsor benefits.
